meta.title: ClawTok: Project Overview
meta.description: TikTok for AI content — specs, scores, and implementation status

props.title: ClawTok
props.subtitle: TikTok-style iOS app for AI-generated content

props.content: Swift 6.0 / SwiftUI, targeting iOS 17+. 47 Swift files, ~14,800 LOC, 14 bundled AI videos, 10 AI music tracks, 10 AI tool screens. Purple (#8B5CF6) + Gold (#F59E0B) brand. 100% mock data — zero backend. Discover Categories track now IMPLEMENTED.

props.title: iOS / Swift
props.content: Swift 6.0, SwiftUI, iOS 17+. @Observable state (AppState, VideoPlayerManager, CameraManager). 5-player AVPlayer pool with preloading and 3x loop.

props.title: Architecture
props.content: Feature-based modules under Features/ (12 areas). Core/ for models, theme, utilities. SharedUI/ for reusable components. NavigationStack + sheets/fullScreenCovers.

props.title: Brand
props.content: Electric Purple #8B5CF6 primary, Amber Gold #F59E0B secondary, pure black background. Red seal + lightning bolt verified badge. Dark-mode only. 13 color tokens.

props.label: IMPLEMENTED
props.title: Discover: Category Landing Pages
props.subtitle: Score 80 (highest) — levloop ct-1 through ct-6 complete

props.title: What shipped
props.content:
**CategoryGridView** — 2-column LazyVGrid, all 12 AICategory cases, gradient cells, trending badge, video count capsule.

**CategoryFeedView** — Filtered video feed per category, pull-to-refresh, VideoFeedSheet fullscreen cover, category header with icon + stats.

**StickyCategoryBar** — Horizontal ScrollView with gradient underline on selected category, auto-scroll via ScrollViewReader.

**DiscoverView wired** — Quick-access row (6 categories) with NavigationLink to CategoryFeedView. 'See all' navigates to CategoryGridView.

items.title: CategoryGridView.swift
items.description: 2-column grid + Models.swift extensions (videoCount, isTrending) + Theme.swift categoryGradient

items.title: CategoryFeedView.swift
items.description: Filtered video feed, thumbnail grid, pull-to-refresh, VideoFeedSheet integration

items.title: StickyCategoryBar.swift
items.description: Horizontal category selector with gradient underline, auto-scroll

items.title: DiscoverView wiring
items.description: Quick-access row (6 cats) → CategoryFeedView, See All → CategoryGridView

items.title: Models + Theme
items.description: Folded into ct-1 (videoCount, isTrending, formattedVideoCount, categoryGradient)

items.title: Validation
items.description: 0 Swift errors, 0 warnings, 0 hardcoded colors, all files in pbxproj

props.title: Profile Redesign (P1, Score: 66)
props.content: Split ProfileView.swift (698 lines) into View mode (portfolio) and Creator mode (horizontal quick-action bar). Extract CreatorQuickActionsBar + ProfileOverflowMenu. @AppStorage persistence. **~350 LOC.**

props.title: Podcast Support (P2, Score: 68)
props.content: Podcast/Episode/Chapter models, 7 AI podcast tools, PodcastPlayerView with speed/sleep/chapters/transcript. 4 new views. NotebookLM integration badge. **~850 LOC.**

props.title: kingly.cloud Router (P3, Score: 66)
props.content: Cross-cutting multi-provider inference gateway. POST /v1/inference, credit reserve/consume/release, 12 tool types, multi-tenant. Go + Swift + SQL. Multi-month epic, 5 phases. **~3,700 LOC.**

props.label: APP DOCS
props.title: Project Documentation
props.subtitle: Architecture, backend plan, brand, features, changelog

props.title: Architecture
props.content: Feature-based modular SwiftUI. 12 feature modules, @Observable state, 5-player AVPlayer pool, NavigationStack. 46 Swift files in Core/ + Features/ + SharedUI/.

props.title: Backend Plan (57K words)
props.content: Go (Fiber) API, PostgreSQL 16 (Supabase), Redis 7 (Upstash), Cloudflare R2 + CDN, BullMQ, Meilisearch, RevenueCat+Stripe, Temporal.io, Grafana, Fly.io. Full production spec.

props.title: Feature Inventory
props.content: FYP with 5-player AVPlayer pool, Live VC tab, Following feed, double-tap hearts, share sheet, 10 AI tool screens, AI Music hub, creator tools, bookmarks, analytics.

100% mock data, zero backend, zero auth, zero tests. The backend plan exists (57K words, Go + Supabase + Redis + R2) but nothing is implemented. All MVP specs are deliberately UI-only to avoid this dependency. The kingly.cloud inference router is the first cross-cutting backend piece — but it's P3 for a reason.
